coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 7:09 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 75% for 7:09. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 7:09 at 75%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: where excitement goes to retire. 7:09 of controlled boredom.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First block at 100%. This is race pace. If you can't hold this, you can't race. Simple.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First threshold block. 95-100% FTP. Settle in — don't overcook the start.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Starting threshold work. This is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/4. 5:00 in the space between 'fine' and 'please make it stop.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1: 100% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Seated. Find your rhythm. Don't overcook the start.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 26% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Set 2: 5:00 at 100%. Sweet spot? Nothing sweet. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 2/4. 37% complete. Hold 100% steady. 23 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Set 2: 5:00 at 100%. Every minute here makes you faster on race day.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 2/4. Your legs are politely requesting a break. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 2/4. 100% FTP, 82-90 rpm. Challenging but sustainable.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 55%, 85-95 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 50-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 5:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 5:00. Then 18min to question life choices.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 59% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 13 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 27 minutes in. 100% at 75-85 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 59% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 1 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 59% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 59% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 100%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 32 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 15min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 69% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 69% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 8 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 5:00 at 100%. Then 3min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last block. 95-100% FTP, 95-105 rpm. After this: 3min cooldown.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 3min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. Then 3min to contemplate your life choices. 100% FTP.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 100% FTP, 95-105 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 91% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 91% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 91% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 91% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 3:51. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
